title: Cricket’s Legend Comes Into View
description: On pages 17, 18, this part focuses on the salvage monkeys appear. Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Salvage Monkeys Appear sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Mont Blanc Cricket, Zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There must be another island nearby,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If the needle is pointing upwards,

summary: Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
